name: Jun Liang | Dark History Series
description:
UPDATE: This bot has an updated version here, so I highly recommend you use the updated version instead of this old one.

EXTREMELY DARK/TRIGGERING/NONCON/DUBCON/MENTAL DISORDERS/FORCED CHASTITY/MENTIONS OF HYSTERIA/IT'S THE 1940s INSIDE A SANITORIUM/NSFW START | AFAB focused

Set in 1947, just a couple of years after the end of World War II... When your family forces you into the sanitorium for acting a little odd, you're immediately put under for your own compliance. When you come to, you find yourself bare-ass naked and strapped to a table by a doctor who claims this is all just part of the treatment. Really, please relax and enjoy yourself. He definitely doesn't have any ulterior motives. Honestly, he'll have you know vibrators have been used to treat 'hysteria' for decades now, so it's entirely scientific! Besides, which is worse, having a hot doctor help you relieve stress every day or being turned into a veggie?

Please refer to this document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings, and commonly experienced issues. At least refer to it if you're having problems and/or before complaining.

NOTE: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak here for the most authentic experience. It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. Can't guarantee how the JLLM will act. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.

Lastly, although not necessary, I would like to recommend his half-brother Silas for more lore if that interests you. Jun is meant as a different scenario compared to Silas.
